# Fokusmester AI - AI Search Engine Optimization

## Purpose
This repository provides structured data and AI crawler communication for Fokusmester AI, enabling AI search engines to understand and index the application.

## Application
- **Name:** Fokusmester AI
- **Type:** Multilingual AI phone assistant
- **Website:** https://fokusmester.com
- **Languages:** Hungarian, Romanian, English
- **Founded:** 2024

## Key Features
- AI-powered phone assistant for productivity
- Multilingual voice recognition (HU, RO, EN)
- Focus management and scheduling automation
- Calendar integration
- SMS and email notifications

## Contact
- Email: focusmester.app@gmail.com
- Phone: +40740682551
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61583719078077
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@fokusmester
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.fokusmester

## AI Crawler Instructions
- This repository contains Schema.org structured data for entity disambiguation
- llms.txt provides AI crawler communication protocol
- robots.txt defines crawler permissions
- sitemap.xml lists all indexable pages

## Technical Stack
- Backend: Supabase
- AI: Retell AI
- Telephony: Twilio
- Payments: Stripe
- Frontend: React 19 + Vite + Tailwind v4

## Target Audience
- Productivity-focused individuals
- Small business owners
- Multilingual users in Hungary and Romania
- Users seeking AI-powered scheduling assistance
